calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Post-Judgment Motion For Attorneys Fees Of Defendants Northern Lights Capital Partners, Llc, Northern Lights Capital Group, Llc, And Treasury Group, Ltd.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jason O. Balogh of Hickey Smith LLP (415-813-4455) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Patrick E. Gibbs of Cooley LLP (650-843-5535) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

Attorney, Rene Kahn of Hickey Smith LLP (626-405-8949) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANTS NORTHERN LIGHTS CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC, NORTHERN LIGHTS CAPITAL GROUP, LLC AND TREASURY GROUP, LTD'S Post-Judgment Motion For Attorneys Fees Of Defendants Northern Lights Capital Partners, LLC, Northern Lights Capital Group, LLC, And Treasury Group, Ltd. is GRANTED IN PART. Defendants are awarded fees in the amount of $90,000, calculated at 120 hours of work at a blended rate of $750 per hour. Defendants are the prevailing parties and entitled to fees per the parties' contract. However, the amount sought by defendants is excessive given that they won this case on an unopposed fairly straight-forward demurrer. Defendants have not shown that the amount of fees they seek are commensurate with what was necessary for them to prevail in the case. The court's own review of defendants' demurrer papers shows that $39,000 is at the upper end of a reasonable fee award for the work necessary to prevail in this case. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
